title: centaurea recta
intro: Centaurea recta, also known as straight centaury, is a perennial plant belonging to the aster family, native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, arthritis, and urinary tract infections. Centaurea recta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
